title: Eva's Scroll Tweaks
description: Keybindable scrolling, keybinds to mimic scrolling, and horizontal scrolling compatibility!
body:
Allows scrolling to be bound to actions, and creates keybinds that mimic scrolling behavior. Whether or not those binds work for whatever you bind your scroll to is up to you.

Adds a callback for scrolling, allowing for horizontal scrolling, as well as cancelling out of scrolling during gameplay. Yes, Architectury API does this too, but this one is just for scrolling stuff. So it's pretty lightweight.

Unfortunately, I don't know how to set up a Maven repository yet, so just use the Modrinth Maven.
